commit_scope: Compute organism influence CC from the field trace, including Urs stewardship time, agent execution time, formative works, creators, channels, and lived practices.

commands: python3 scripts/organism_influence_cc.py --slug urs-field-story --limit 12 --cc-pool 1000 | jq '{policy_id, source_crypto_root, totals, top: [.top_influencers[] | {rank,name,kind,computed_cc,ledger_recipient_id}]}'
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py tests/test_field_story_agent_surface.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check app/services/organism_influence_cc_service.py app/routers/field_stories.py app/services/field_story_mcp_tools.py tests/test_field_story_trace_index.py
local_validation.summary: The focused API/MCP tests, CLI computation, py_compile, ruff, maintainability audit, whitespace validation, local runtime verifier, PR guard, and follow-through check pass. The first PR guard run saw a runtime-web verifier miss; direct verifier and guard rerun passed.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR creation, and GitHub check monitoring.

deploy_validation.details: Pending merge to main and public deploy verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Agents and humans can now request a compact read-only CC distribution over the organism's top influencers through API, MCP, or CLI without loading bulky source bodies.
test_flows: API flow returns source crypto root, pool totals, Urs stewardship, agent time, Spellmonger, and Terry Mancour recipient ids.
MCP flow exposes get_organism_influence_cc through TOOL_MAP.
CLI flow returns the same policy id, totals, and ranked top influencers.

phase_gate.reason: Local implementation validation and pre-commit gates are complete; push, PR CI, and public deploy validation remain.
